title: LegenVD
description:
Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.
This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: Making a mill deck look cool.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a monoblack mill combo deck, featuring Scavenger's Talent, Treasure Map and Doomsday Excruciator from Duskmourn in Standard.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

35:00 - Match 6
